Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Threading.Tasks
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Reflection
Imports System.Deployment
Imports System.Net
Imports System.ServiceModel.Configuration
Imports System.Configuration
Imports System.Data.SqlClient
Imports Newtonsoft.Json

Public Class frm_a_a_prelog

    Dim cargado As Boolean = False
    Dim testPlex As Boolean = False

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Checks if a file exists with a timeout to prevent hanging on unreachable network shares.
    ''' </summary>
    ''' <param name="filePath">The UNC path or local path to check</param>
    ''' <param name="timeoutMs">Timeout in milliseconds (default 1000ms = 1 second)</param>
    ''' <returns>True if file exists within timeout, False otherwise</returns>
    Private Function FileExistsWithTimeout(filePath As String, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Try
            Dim task As Task(Of Boolean) = task.Run(Function() File.Exists(filePath))

            If task.Wait(timeoutMs) Then
                Return task.Result
            Else
                ' Timeout occurred
                Return False
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' Handle any errors (network unreachable, etc.)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    Private Sub frm_prelog_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        '2023-09-05 EM: ASK FOR DEVELOPERS SETINGS.
        '2023-01-16 EM: Check Computer Name

        '2020-02-10 EMSet Server Configuration
        BeConfig.SaveConfigurationFile()

        'System.Net.ServicePointManager.Expect100Continue = False

        ExData.BEARER = New Bearer
        ExData.BEARER = GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials("/Account/getTokenAsync", BeApi.Username, BeApi.Password)

            MsgBox("401: Unauthorized | Servidor no disponible. " & ExData.SERVERAPIS)
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        '2023-01-13 EM: Update Settings
        Call Global.Production.Settings.UpdateGlobalSettings()

        ExData.ConnectionString = Global.Production.Settings.ConnectionString.setting_Value 'TOREMOVE
        ExData.ConnectionString_OLD = Global.Production.Settings.ConnectionString_OLD.setting_Value 'TOREMOVE
        If ExData.ConnectionString.Length = 0 Then
            MsgBox("Unable to get Connection String")
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        '2023-01-15 em: CONFIGURE BEUSER
        ExData.SELECTED_BEFIRST_WINDOWS_USER = New BeFirstWindowsUser
        ExData.SELECTED_BEFIRST_WINDOWS_USER.Username = Global.Production.WindowsUser.setting_Value
        ExData.SELECTED_BEFIRST_WINDOWS_USER.Password = Global.Production.WindowsUserPassword.setting_Value
        ExData.SELECTED_BEFIRST_WINDOWS_USER.Domain = Global.Production.WindowsUserDomain.setting_Value

        '2023-01-15 EM: CONFIGURE BEPLEX
        BePlex.SOAPUsername = Global.Production.PLEXSOAPUsername.setting_Value
        BePlex.SOAPPassword = Global.Production.PLEXSOAPPassword.setting_Value

        '2023-01-15 EM: READ OTHER SETTINGS
        Call Global.Production.Settings.UpdateSettings()

        '2023-01-15 EM: Configure Language
        ExData.LANGUAGE = Global.Production.Settings.Language.setting_Value 'TOREMOVE
        Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentCulture = New CultureInfo("en")
        Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentUICulture = New CultureInfo(Global.Production.Settings.Language.setting_Value)

        '2020-01-01 EM: Set others parameters.
        If Global.Production.UpdateSettingsVariables() = False Then
            MsgBox("Unable to get Settings")
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        ExData.LocalUpdatesDirectory = "C:\BeFirst\programs\" & ProductName & "\"
        ExData.ServerDirectory = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\pn\aids"

        ExData.ServerDirectoryRework = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\rework"

        ExData.ServerDirectoryUploads = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\UploadedFiles"

        '2020-08-11 EM: SET BeFirst Connection String

    Private Sub changeLanguage()
        Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentCulture = New CultureInfo("en")
        Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentUICulture = New CultureInfo(ExData.LANGUAGE)

        lbl_username.Text = My.Resources.Messages.labelusername
        lbl_password.Text = My.Resources.Messages.labelpassword
        btn_login.Text = My.Resources.Messages.labelbtnlogin

        lblend.Text = My.Resources.Messages.labelend & ExData.CONF_Shutdown.ToString("")
    End Sub


    Private Sub btn_login_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_login.Click

        ExData.Selected_User = New User

        '2023-01-16 EM: Check Computer Name
        Dim strHostName As String = System.Windows.Forms.SystemInformation.ComputerName

        Dim ParametersComputer As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersComputer.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "Hostname", .Value = strHostName})

        Dim HostanemResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Station/isAuthorized", "GET", ParametersComputer)

        'MsgBox("Authorized")

        Dim pass As Boolean = False

        If HostanemResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            pass = HostanemResponse.Response
        End If

        If pass = False Then

            MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.selector_computer, MsgBoxStyle.OkOnly, "Error.")
            txt_username.Text = ""
            txt_password.Text = ""
            txt_username.SelectAll()

        Else

            Dim ParametersUser As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
            ParametersUser.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "Username", .Value = txt_username.Text.Replace("'", "")})
            ParametersUser.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "Password", .Value = txt_password.Text.Replace("'", "")})

            Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Account/getUserLogin", "GET", ParametersUser)

            'MsgBox("Authorized")

            If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
                ExData.Selected_User = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of User)(APIResponse.Response)
            ElseIf APIResponse.ResponseCode = 400 Then
                MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.prelog_User_Error, MsgBoxStyle.OkOnly, My.Resources.Messages.prelog_User_Error_Title)
            End If


            If ExData.Selected_User.ASPNET_Username = "" Then
                If ExData.Selected_User.passwordRequired Then
                    txt_password.Text = ""
                    txt_password.Enabled = True
                    txt_password.Select()
                Else
                    txt_username.Text = ""
                    txt_password.Text = ""
                    txt_username.Select()
                End If
            Else

                If IsNumeric(ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID) = False Then
                    ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID = "0"
                End If

                ExData.Selected_User.Picture = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\users\" & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "-" & ExData.Selected_User.Name.Split(" ")(0) & ".jpg"
                If FileExistsWithTimeout(ExData.Selected_User.Picture, 1000) Then


                Else
                    Dim Image_AspNetUsers As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT Common_Files_Uploaded.FileName FROM AspNetUsers INNER JOIN Common_Files_Uploaded ON AspNetUsers.PictureID = CAST(Common_Files_Uploaded.FileID AS NVARCHAR(10)) WHERE        (AspNetUsers.ControlID = '" & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "')")
                    ExData.Selected_User.Picture = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\users\" & Image_AspNetUsers
                End If
                If ExData.Selected_User.PLEX_User_No <= 0 Then
                    ExData.Selected_User.PLEX_User_No = 6065

                    MsgBox("Error de usuario, notificar a sistemas.")
                    txt_username.Text = ""
                    txt_password.Text = ""
                    txt_username.SelectAll()
                    Exit Sub
                Else
                    If ExFunctions.getUserPermission(ExData.Selected_User.ASPNET_ID, "BF Administrator") Then
                        Me.Hide()
                        Dim optiosnadmin As New frm_Admin
                        optiosnadmin.ShowDialog()
                    End If

                    If testPlex And ExFunctions.getUserPermission(ExData.Selected_User.ASPNET_ID, "BF Administrator") = False And Global.Production.Enviroment.setting_Value = "Production" Then
                        MsgBox("ONLY ADMINISTRATOR")
                        txt_username.Text = ""
                        txt_password.Text = ""
                        txt_username.SelectAll()
                        Exit Sub
                    End If

                    frm_a_b_Login.Show()
                    Me.Hide()
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_close_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_close.Tick
        RestartSystem()
    End Sub

    Public Function SetShutDown() As Boolean

        If ExData.CONF_Production_Restart_At.Length > 0 Then

            Dim times() As String = ExData.CONF_Production_Restart_At.Split(",")


            Dim nothingselect As Boolean = False
            ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay = False

            For Each item As String In times

                Dim time As TimeSpan = TimeSpan.Parse(item)

                If time > Now.TimeOfDay Then
                    nothingselect = True

                    ExData.CONF_Shutdown = TimeSpan.Parse(item)
                    tmr_Restart.Start()

                    Exit For
                End If
            Next

            If nothingselect = False And times.Length > 0 Then
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay = True
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown = TimeSpan.Parse(times(0))
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay_Maximum = TimeSpan.Parse(times(times.Length - 1))
                tmr_Restart.Start()
            End If

        Else
            tmr_Restart.Stop()
        End If

        Return True
    End Function

    Private Sub tmr_Restart_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Restart.Tick
        If ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay Then
            If Now.TimeOfDay < ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay_Maximum Then
                If Now.TimeOfDay >= ExData.CONF_Shutdown Then
                    Try
                        RestartSystem()
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                End If
            End If
        Else
            If Now.TimeOfDay >= ExData.CONF_Shutdown Then
                Try
                    RestartSystem()
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub frm_a_a_prelog_Shown(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Shown
        If testPlex Then
            btn_login.BackColor = Color.Yellow
            btn_login.Text = "PLEX TEST API"
        End If

        Dim options As New frm_a_b_facility
        options.ShowDialog()

        lblIPServer.Text = BeConfig.ServerSite

        Environment.Exit(0)
    End Sub

Imports System.IO

Public Class frm_printer_config

    Private ConfigFilePath As String = "C:\BeFirst\Configuration\Production_Printers.txt"
    Private printerSettings As Dictionary(Of String, String)

    Private Sub frm_printer_config_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        LoadPrinterConfiguration()
        PopulateForm()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Loads printer configuration from the text file
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub LoadPrinterConfiguration()
        printerSettings = New Dictionary(Of String, String)()

        Try
            If File.Exists(ConfigFilePath) Then
                Dim lines() As String = File.ReadAllLines(ConfigFilePath)

                For Each line As String In lines
                    If line.Trim().StartsWith("@") And line.Contains("^") Then
                        Dim parts() As String = line.Split("^"c)
                        If parts.Length = 2 Then
                            Dim key As String = parts(0).Replace("@", "").Trim()
                            Dim value As String = parts(1).Trim()
                            printerSettings(key) = value
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
            Else
                MessageBox.Show("Configuration file not found: " & ConfigFilePath, "Warning", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error loading configuration: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Populates form controls with loaded printer settings
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub PopulateForm()
        ' Printer 1
        txt_Printer1_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_1_IP")
        txt_Printer1_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_1_Name")
        txt_Printer1_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_1_Path")
        cmb_Printer1_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_1_Type"))

        ' Printer 2
        txt_Printer2_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_2_IP")
        txt_Printer2_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_2_Name")
        txt_Printer2_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_2_Path")
        cmb_Printer2_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_2_Type"))

        ' Printer 3
        txt_Printer3_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_3_IP")
        txt_Printer3_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_3_Name")
        txt_Printer3_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_3_Path")
        cmb_Printer3_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_3_Type"))

        ' Packout 1
        txt_Packout1_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout1_IP")
        txt_Packout1_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout1_Name")
        txt_Packout1_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout1_Path")
        cmb_Packout1_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_packout1_Type"))

        ' Packout 2
        txt_Packout2_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout2_IP")
        txt_Packout2_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout2_Name")
        txt_Packout2_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout2_Path")
        cmb_Packout2_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_packout2_Type"))
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Gets a setting value from the dictionary
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function GetSetting(key As String) As String
        If printerSettings.ContainsKey(key) Then
            Return printerSettings(key)
        End If
        Return ""
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Converts type string to combo box index
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function GetTypeIndex(typeValue As String) As Integer
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(typeValue) Then Return 0
        Dim typeNum As Integer
        If Integer.TryParse(typeValue, typeNum) Then
            Return typeNum
        End If
        Return 0
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Saves the printer configuration to file
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_Save_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Save.Click
        Try
            Dim lines As New List(Of String)()

            ' Printer 1
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_1_IP^" & txt_Printer1_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_1_Name^" & txt_Printer1_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_1_Path^" & txt_Printer1_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_1_Type^" & cmb_Printer1_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Printer 2
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_2_IP^" & txt_Printer2_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_2_Name^" & txt_Printer2_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_2_Path^" & txt_Printer2_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_2_Type^" & cmb_Printer2_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Printer 3
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_3_IP^" & txt_Printer3_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_3_Name^" & txt_Printer3_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_3_Path^" & txt_Printer3_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_3_Type^" & cmb_Printer3_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Packout 1
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout1_IP^" & txt_Packout1_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout1_Name^" & txt_Packout1_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout1_Path^" & txt_Packout1_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout1_Type^" & cmb_Packout1_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Packout 2
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout2_IP^" & txt_Packout2_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout2_Name^" & txt_Packout2_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout2_Path^" & txt_Packout2_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout2_Type^" & cmb_Packout2_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Add comment line
            lines.Add("#Types: 1Name 2 3Other")
            lines.Add("")

            ' Create directory if it doesn't exist
            Dim directory As String = Path.GetDirectoryName(ConfigFilePath)
            If Not Directory.Exists(directory) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(directory)
            End If

            ' Write to file
            File.WriteAllLines(ConfigFilePath, lines)

            MessageBox.Show("Printer configuration saved successfully!", "Success", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
            Me.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
            Me.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error saving configuration: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Cancels and closes the form
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_Cancel_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Cancel.Click
        Me.DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

End Class

            MessageBox.Show("Printer configuration saved successfully!", "Success", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
            Me.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
            Me.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error saving configuration: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_Cancel_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Cancel.Click
        Me.DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

End Class

﻿Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Threading.Tasks
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Reflection
Imports System.Deployment
Imports System.Net
Imports System.ServiceModel.Configuration
Imports System.Configuration
Imports System.Data.SqlClient
Imports Newtonsoft.Json

Public Class frm_a_a_prelog

    Dim cargado As Boolean = False
    Dim testPlex As Boolean = False

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Checks if a file exists with a timeout to prevent hanging on unreachable network shares.
    ''' </summary>
    ''' <param name="filePath">The UNC path or local path to check</param>
    ''' <param name="timeoutMs">Timeout in milliseconds (default 1000ms = 1 second)</param>
    ''' <returns>True if file exists within timeout, False otherwise</returns>
    Private Function FileExistsWithTimeout(filePath As String, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Try
            Dim task As Task(Of Boolean) = task.Run(Function() File.Exists(filePath))

            If task.Wait(timeoutMs) Then
                Return task.Result
            Else
                ' Timeout occurred
                Return False
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' Handle any errors (network unreachable, etc.)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    Private Sub frm_prelog_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        '2023-09-05 EM: ASK FOR DEVELOPERS SETINGS.
        '2023-01-16 EM: Check Computer Name
        Dim strHostName As String = System.Windows.Forms.SystemInformation.ComputerName

        '2020-02-10 EMSet Server Configuration
        BeConfig.SaveConfigurationFile()

        'System.Net.ServicePointManager.Expect100Continue = False
        System.Net.ServicePointManager.SecurityProtocol = SecurityProtocolType.Tls Or SecurityProtocolType.Tls11 Or SecurityProtocolType.Tls12

        '2023-01-10 EM: Set Bearer for api.
        ExData.BEARER = New Bearer
        ExData.BEARER = GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials("/Account/getTokenAsync", BeApi.Username, BeApi.Password)

        If ExData.BEARER.access_token.Length = 0 Then
            MsgBox("401: Unauthorized | Servidor no disponible. " & ExData.SERVERAPIS)
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        '2023-01-13 EM: Update Settings
        Call Global.Production.Settings.UpdateGlobalSettings()

        ExData.ConnectionString = Global.Production.Settings.ConnectionString.setting_Value 'TOREMOVE
        ExData.ConnectionString_OLD = Global.Production.Settings.ConnectionString_OLD.setting_Value 'TOREMOVE
        If ExData.ConnectionString.Length = 0 Then
            MsgBox("Unable to get Connection String")
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        '2023-01-15 em: CONFIGURE BEUSER
        ExData.SELECTED_BEFIRST_WINDOWS_USER = New BeFirstWindowsUser
        ExData.SELECTED_BEFIRST_WINDOWS_USER.Username = Global.Production.WindowsUser.setting_Value
        ExData.SELECTED_BEFIRST_WINDOWS_USER.Password = Global.Production.WindowsUserPassword.setting_Value
        ExData.SELECTED_BEFIRST_WINDOWS_USER.Domain = Global.Production.WindowsUserDomain.setting_Value

        '2023-01-15 EM: CONFIGURE BEPLEX
        BePlex.SOAPUsername = Global.Production.PLEXSOAPUsername.setting_Value
        BePlex.SOAPPassword = Global.Production.PLEXSOAPPassword.setting_Value

        '2023-01-15 EM: READ OTHER SETTINGS
        Call Global.Production.Settings.UpdateSettings()

        '2023-01-15 EM: Configure Language
        ExData.LANGUAGE = Global.Production.Settings.Language.setting_Value 'TOREMOVE
        Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentCulture = New CultureInfo("en")
        Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentUICulture = New CultureInfo(Global.Production.Settings.Language.setting_Value)

        '2020-01-01 EM: Set others parameters.
        If Global.Production.UpdateSettingsVariables() = False Then
            MsgBox("Unable to get Settings")
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        ExData.ServerDirectoryImages = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\pn\images"
        ExData.LocalDirectoryImages = "C:\BeFirst\pn\Images"
        ExData.wwwtracking = "http://" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "/BeFirst/tracking/serialnumber.aspx"
        ExData.ServerUpdatesDirectory = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\programs\" & ProductName & "\"
        ExData.ServerUpdatesDirectoryFull = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\programs\" & ProductName & "\" & ProductName & ".application"
        ExData.LocalUpdatesDirectory = "C:\BeFirst\programs\" & ProductName & "\"
        ExData.ServerDirectory = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\pn\aids"
        ExData.LocalDirectory = "C:\BeFirst\pn\aids"
        ExData.ServerDirectoryAlerts = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\Befirstdata\models\QAAlerts"
        ExData.ServerDirectoryAlerts_New = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\Befirstdata\UploadedFiles\QA_Alerts"
        ExData.ServerDirectoryRework = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\rework"
        ExData.ServerRMAImages = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\pictures\rmafounds"
        ExData.ServerDirectoryUploads = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\UploadedFiles"

        '2020-08-11 EM: SET BeFirst Connection String
        BeConn.ConnectionString = ExData.ConnectionString
        BeConn.Connection = New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(BeConn.ConnectionString)

        '2023-11-30 EM: Temporal Legacy...
        BeConn_OLD.ConnectionString = ExData.ConnectionString_OLD
        BeConn_OLD.Connection = New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(BeConn_OLD.ConnectionString)

        BeConnMachines.ConnectionString = Global.Production.ConnectionStringMachines.setting_Value
        BeConnMachines.Connection = New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(BeConnMachines.ConnectionString)

        '2020-02-10 EM: Set Prin detials

        BeConfig.SavePrintersFiles()


        If Global.Production.Settings.Language.setting_Value = "es" Then
            rb_es.Checked = True
            rb_us.Checked = False
        Else
            rb_us.Checked = True
            rb_es.Checked = False
        End If

        SetShutDown()

        changeLanguage()

        cargado = True

        Try
            Dim cversion = System.Deployment.Application.ApplicationDeployment.CurrentDeployment.CurrentVersion.ToString.Split(".")
            ExData.SOFTWAREVERSION = cversion(0) & "." & cversion(1) & "." & cversion(2)

    Public Function SetShutDown() As Boolean

        If ExData.CONF_Production_Restart_At.Length > 0 Then

            Dim times() As String = ExData.CONF_Production_Restart_At.Split(",")


            Dim nothingselect As Boolean = False
            ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay = False

            For Each item As String In times

                Dim time As TimeSpan = TimeSpan.Parse(item)

                If time > Now.TimeOfDay Then
                    nothingselect = True

                    ExData.CONF_Shutdown = TimeSpan.Parse(item)
                    tmr_Restart.Start()

                    Exit For
                End If
            Next

            If nothingselect = False And times.Length > 0 Then
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay = True
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown = TimeSpan.Parse(times(0))
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay_Maximum = TimeSpan.Parse(times(times.Length - 1))
                tmr_Restart.Start()
            End If

        Else
            tmr_Restart.Stop()
        End If

        Return True
    End Function

    Private Sub tmr_Restart_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Restart.Tick
        If ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay Then
            If Now.TimeOfDay < ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay_Maximum Then
                If Now.TimeOfDay >= ExData.CONF_Shutdown Then
                    Try
                        RestartSystem()
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                End If
            End If
        Else
            If Now.TimeOfDay >= ExData.CONF_Shutdown Then
                Try
                    RestartSystem()
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Function FileExistsWithTimeout(filePath As String, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Try
            Dim task As Task(Of Boolean) = task.Run(Function() File.Exists(filePath))

            If task.Wait(timeoutMs) Then
                Return task.Result
            Else
                ' Timeout occurred

            End If

    ''' <summary>

    Private Sub CreatePrinterIcon()
        Try
            Dim bmp As New Bitmap(32, 32)
            Using g As Graphics = Graphics.FromImage(bmp)
                g.Clear(Color.Transparent)

                ' Draw a simple printer icon
                Using brush As New SolidBrush(Color.FromArgb(64, 64, 64))
                    ' Printer body
                    g.FillRectangle(brush, 6, 10, 20, 14)
                    ' Printer top
                    g.FillRectangle(brush, 4, 6, 24, 4)
                    ' Paper
                    Using paperBrush As New SolidBrush(Color.White)
                        g.FillRectangle(paperBrush, 8, 18, 16, 10)
                    End Using
                    ' Paper outline
                    g.DrawRectangle(Pens.Gray, 8, 18, 16, 10)
                End Using
            End Using

            btn_printer.Image = bmp
            btn_printer.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' If icon creation fails, just leave it as is
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>

    ''' <returns>True if file exists within timeout, False otherwise</returns>
    Private Function FileExistsWithTimeout(filePath As String, timeoutMs As Integer) As Boolean
        Try
            Dim task As Task(Of Boolean) = task.Run(Function() File.Exists(filePath))

            If task.Wait(timeoutMs) Then
                Return task.Result
            Else
                ' Timeout occurred
                Return False
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' Handle any errors (network unreachable, etc.)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        '2023-01-13 EM: Update Settings
        Call Global.Production.Settings.UpdateGlobalSettings()

        ExData.ConnectionString = Global.Production.Settings.ConnectionString.setting_Value 'TOREMOVE
        ExData.ConnectionString_OLD = Global.Production.Settings.ConnectionString_OLD.setting_Value 'TOREMOVE

        '2020-08-11 EM: SET BeFirst Connection String
        BeConn.ConnectionString = ExData.ConnectionString

            ExData.SOFTWAREVERSION_FULL = cversion(0) & "." & cversion(1) & "." & cversion(2) & "." & cversion(3)

            Catch ex2 As Exception

            End Try
        End Try

        If ExData.SOAPName = "TestServiceSoap" Then

        End If

        Dim dtFacilities As DataTable = New DataTable
        dtFacilities.Columns.Add("ID", GetType(String))

        Dim selectSite() As DataRow = dtFacilities.Select("ID='" & ExData.SERVERIP & "'")

    Private Sub btn_login_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_login.Click

        ExData.Selected_User = New User

        '2023-01-16 EM: Check Computer Name
        Dim strHostName As String = System.Windows.Forms.SystemInformation.ComputerName

        Dim ParametersComputer As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersComputer.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "Hostname", .Value = strHostName})

        Dim HostanemResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Station/isAuthorized", "GET", ParametersComputer)

        'MsgBox("Authorized")

        Dim pass As Boolean = False

        If HostanemResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            pass = HostanemResponse.Response
        End If

        If pass = False Then

            MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.selector_computer, MsgBoxStyle.OkOnly, "Error.")
            txt_username.Text = ""
            txt_password.Text = ""
            txt_username.SelectAll()

        Else

            Dim ParametersUser As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
            ParametersUser.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "Username", .Value = txt_username.Text.Replace("'", "")})
            ParametersUser.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "Password", .Value = txt_password.Text.Replace("'", "")})

            Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Account/getUserLogin", "GET", ParametersUser)

            'MsgBox("Authorized")

            If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
                ExData.Selected_User = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of User)(APIResponse.Response)
            ElseIf APIResponse.ResponseCode = 400 Then
                MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.prelog_User_Error, MsgBoxStyle.OkOnly, My.Resources.Messages.prelog_User_Error_Title)
            End If


            If ExData.Selected_User.ASPNET_Username = "" Then
                If ExData.Selected_User.passwordRequired Then
                    txt_password.Text = ""
                    txt_password.Enabled = True
                    txt_password.Select()
                Else
                    txt_username.Text = ""
                    txt_password.Text = ""
                    txt_username.Select()
                End If
            Else

                If IsNumeric(ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID) = False Then
                    ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID = "0"
                End If

                ExData.Selected_User.Picture = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\users\" & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "-" & ExData.Selected_User.Name.Split(" ")(0) & ".jpg"
                If FileExistsWithTimeout(ExData.Selected_User.Picture, 1000) Then


                Else
                    Dim Image_AspNetUsers As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT Common_Files_Uploaded.FileName FROM AspNetUsers INNER JOIN Common_Files_Uploaded ON AspNetUsers.PictureID = CAST(Common_Files_Uploaded.FileID AS NVARCHAR(10)) WHERE        (AspNetUsers.ControlID = '" & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "')")
                    ExData.Selected_User.Picture = "\\" & ExData.SERVERFILESIP & "\BeFirstData\users\" & Image_AspNetUsers
                End If
                If ExData.Selected_User.PLEX_User_No <= 0 Then
                    ExData.Selected_User.PLEX_User_No = 6065

                    MsgBox("Error de usuario, notificar a sistemas.")
                    txt_username.Text = ""
                    txt_password.Text = ""
                    txt_username.SelectAll()
                    Exit Sub
                Else
                    If ExFunctions.getUserPermission(ExData.Selected_User.ASPNET_ID, "BF Administrator") Then
                        Me.Hide()
                        Dim optiosnadmin As New frm_Admin
                        optiosnadmin.ShowDialog()
                    End If

                    If testPlex And ExFunctions.getUserPermission(ExData.Selected_User.ASPNET_ID, "BF Administrator") = False And Global.Production.Enviroment.setting_Value = "Production" Then
                        MsgBox("ONLY ADMINISTRATOR")
                        txt_username.Text = ""
                        txt_password.Text = ""
                        txt_username.SelectAll()
                        Exit Sub
                    End If

                    frm_a_b_Login.Show()
                    Me.Hide()
                End If
            End If
        End If

    Private Sub tmr_close_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_close.Tick
        RestartSystem()
    End Sub

    Public Function SetShutDown() As Boolean

        If ExData.CONF_Production_Restart_At.Length > 0 Then

            Dim times() As String = ExData.CONF_Production_Restart_At.Split(",")


            Dim nothingselect As Boolean = False
            ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay = False

            For Each item As String In times

                Dim time As TimeSpan = TimeSpan.Parse(item)

                If time > Now.TimeOfDay Then
                    nothingselect = True

                    ExData.CONF_Shutdown = TimeSpan.Parse(item)
                    tmr_Restart.Start()

                    Exit For
                End If
            Next

            If nothingselect = False And times.Length > 0 Then
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay = True
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown = TimeSpan.Parse(times(0))
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay_Maximum = TimeSpan.Parse(times(times.Length - 1))
                tmr_Restart.Start()
            End If

        Else
            tmr_Restart.Stop()
        End If

        Return True
    End Function

    Private Sub tmr_Restart_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Restart.Tick
        If ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay Then
            If Now.TimeOfDay < ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay_Maximum Then
                If Now.TimeOfDay >= ExData.CONF_Shutdown Then
                    Try
                        RestartSystem()
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                End If
            End If
        Else
            If Now.TimeOfDay >= ExData.CONF_Shutdown Then
                Try
                    RestartSystem()
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

        If testPlex Then
            btn_login.BackColor = Color.Yellow

        lblIPServer.Text = BeConfig.ServerSite

        Environment.Exit(0)

        printerConfig.ShowDialog()
    End Sub

    Public Function SetShutDown() As Boolean

        If ExData.CONF_Production_Restart_At.Length > 0 Then

            Dim times() As String = ExData.CONF_Production_Restart_At.Split(",")


            Dim nothingselect As Boolean = False
            ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay = False

            For Each item As String In times

                Dim time As TimeSpan = TimeSpan.Parse(item)

                If time > Now.TimeOfDay Then
                    nothingselect = True

                    ExData.CONF_Shutdown = TimeSpan.Parse(item)
                    tmr_Restart.Start()

                    Exit For
                End If
            Next

            If nothingselect = False And times.Length > 0 Then
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay = True
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown = TimeSpan.Parse(times(0))
                ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay_Maximum = TimeSpan.Parse(times(times.Length - 1))
                tmr_Restart.Start()
            End If

        Else
            tmr_Restart.Stop()
        End If

        Return True
    End Function

    Private Sub tmr_Restart_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Restart.Tick
        If ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay Then
            If Now.TimeOfDay < ExData.CONF_Shutdown_NextDay_Maximum Then
                If Now.TimeOfDay >= ExData.CONF_Shutdown Then
                    Try
                        RestartSystem()
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                End If
            End If
        Else
            If Now.TimeOfDay >= ExData.CONF_Shutdown Then
                Try
                    RestartSystem()
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    ''' Creates a simple printer icon bitmap for the button
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub CreatePrinterIcon()
        Try
            Dim bmp As New Bitmap(32, 32)
            Using g As Graphics = Graphics.FromImage(bmp)
                g.Clear(Color.Transparent)

                ' Draw a simple printer icon
                Using brush As New SolidBrush(Color.FromArgb(64, 64, 64))
                    ' Printer body
                    g.FillRectangle(brush, 6, 10, 20, 14)
                    ' Printer top
                    g.FillRectangle(brush, 4, 6, 24, 4)
                    ' Paper
                    Using paperBrush As New SolidBrush(Color.White)
                        g.FillRectangle(paperBrush, 8, 18, 16, 10)
                    End Using
                    ' Paper outline
                    g.DrawRectangle(Pens.Gray, 8, 18, 16, 10)
                End Using
            End Using

            btn_printer.Image = bmp
            btn_printer.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' If icon creation fails, just leave it as is
        End Try
    End Sub
End Class

input.content:
# Printer Configuration Feature

## Overview
Added a printer configuration button to the login form (`frm_a_a_prelog`) that allows users to configure printer settings through a dedicated configuration form.

## Files Created/Modified

### New Files
1. **frm_printer_config.vb**
   - Main form for printer configuration
   - Reads/writes to `C:\BeFirst\Configuration\Production_Printers.txt`
   - Handles 5 printers: Printer 1, Printer 2, Printer 3, Packout 1, Packout 2

2. **frm_printer_config.Designer.vb**
   - UI designer for the printer configuration form
   - Contains GroupBoxes for each printer with fields for IP, Name, Path, and Type

### Modified Files
1. **frm_a_a_prelog.vb**
   - Added `btn_printer_Click` handler to launch printer configuration
   - Added `CreatePrinterIcon()` method to generate a simple printer icon bitmap
   - Added `Imports System.Drawing` for graphics functionality

2. **frm_a_a_prelog.Designer.vb**
   - Added `btn_printer` PictureBox control to TableLayoutPanel6
   - Button appears between the server label and settings button

## Configuration File Format

**Location:** `C:\BeFirst\Configuration\Production_Printers.txt`

**Format:**
```
@PRINTER_1_IP^[IP Address]
@PRINTER_1_Name^[Printer Name]
@PRINTER_1_Path^[Network Path]
@PRINTER_1_Type^[Type Number: 0-3]
@PRINTER_2_IP^[IP Address]
@PRINTER_2_Name^[Printer Name]
@PRINTER_2_Path^[Network Path]
@PRINTER_2_Type^[Type Number: 0-3]
@PRINTER_3_IP^[IP Address]
@PRINTER_3_Name^[Printer Name]
@PRINTER_3_Path^[Network Path]
@PRINTER_3_Type^[Type Number: 0-3]
@PRINTER_packout1_IP^[IP Address]
@PRINTER_packout1_Name^[Printer Name]
@PRINTER_packout1_Path^[Network Path]
@PRINTER_packout1_Type^[Type Number: 0-3]
@PRINTER_packout2_IP^[IP Address]
@PRINTER_packout2_Name^[Printer Name]
@PRINTER_packout2_Path^[Network Path]
@PRINTER_packout2_Type^[Type Number: 0-3]
#Types: 1Name 2 3Other
```

## How to Use

### Accessing Printer Configuration
1. Launch the BeFirst Production application
2. On the login screen, look for the printer icon button next to the settings gear icon
3. Click the printer button to open the printer configuration form

### Configuring Printers
1. In the printer configuration form, you'll see 5 printer groups:
   - Printer 1
   - Printer 2
   - Printer 3
   - Packout Printer 1
   - Packout Printer 2

2. For each printer, configure the following fields:
   - **IP:** Printer IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.100)
   - **Name:** Printer name (e.g., DEFAULT, ZEBRA_01)
   - **Path:** Network path to printer (e.g., \\server\printer)
   - **Type:** Printer type (dropdown: blank, 1, 2, or 3)

3. Click **Save** to write changes to the configuration file
4. Click **Cancel** to close without saving

### Configuration File Management
- The configuration file is automatically created if it doesn't exist
- The directory `C:\BeFirst\Configuration\` is created automatically if needed
- Validation: The form reads and parses the existing configuration on load
- Error handling: Displays user-friendly messages if file operations fail

## UI Layout

The printer button is positioned in the bottom row of the login form:
```
[Server Label] [Printer Icon] [Settings Icon]
```

## Technical Details

### Printer Icon
- A simple printer icon is generated programmatically using GDI+ graphics
- 32x32 pixel bitmap with a basic printer shape
- Colors: Dark gray (#404040) for printer body, white for paper
- Automatically created on form load if no image resource exists

### Form Properties
- **Size:** 750 x 456 pixels
- **Border:** FixedDialog (non-resizable)
- **Position:** CenterScreen
- **Modal:** Yes (ShowDialog)

### Data Persistence
- Changes are immediately written to the text file on Save
- File format preserves the `@KEY^VALUE` structure
- Comment lines (starting with #) are preserved

## Error Handling

The feature includes error handling for:
- Missing configuration file (warning, continues with empty values)
- File read errors (displays error message)
- File write errors (displays error message)
- Invalid file format (skips invalid lines)
- Missing directory (automatically creates)

## Future Enhancements

Potential improvements:
1. Add printer icon image resource instead of programmatic generation
2. Add "Test Print" button to verify printer connectivity
3. Add validation for IP address format
4. Add printer discovery/scanning feature
5. Support more than 5 printers (dynamic list)
6. Export/Import configuration between machines

## Maintenance Notes

- Configuration file must be accessible from all production stations
- Consider using a network share for centralized configuration
- Backup the configuration file before making manual edits
- The Type field values are currently: 0 (blank), 1, 2, or 3 - document their meanings

## Author
Eduardo D. Marquez
Date: 2025-05-15
Version: 1.0

Imports System.IO

Public Class frm_printer_config

    Private ConfigFilePath As String = "C:\BeFirst\Configuration\Production_Printers.txt"
    Private printerSettings As Dictionary(Of String, String)

    Private Sub frm_printer_config_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        LoadPrinterConfiguration()
        PopulateForm()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Loads printer configuration from the text file
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub LoadPrinterConfiguration()
        printerSettings = New Dictionary(Of String, String)()

        Try
            If File.Exists(ConfigFilePath) Then
                Dim lines() As String = File.ReadAllLines(ConfigFilePath)

                For Each line As String In lines
                    If line.Trim().StartsWith("@") And line.Contains("^") Then
                        Dim parts() As String = line.Split("^"c)
                        If parts.Length = 2 Then
                            Dim key As String = parts(0).Replace("@", "").Trim()
                            Dim value As String = parts(1).Trim()
                            printerSettings(key) = value
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
            Else
                MessageBox.Show("Configuration file not found: " & ConfigFilePath, "Warning", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error loading configuration: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Populates form controls with loaded printer settings
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub PopulateForm()
        ' Printer 1
        txt_Printer1_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_1_IP")
        txt_Printer1_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_1_Name")
        txt_Printer1_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_1_Path")
        cmb_Printer1_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_1_Type"))

        ' Printer 2
        txt_Printer2_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_2_IP")
        txt_Printer2_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_2_Name")
        txt_Printer2_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_2_Path")
        cmb_Printer2_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_2_Type"))

        ' Printer 3
        txt_Printer3_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_3_IP")
        txt_Printer3_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_3_Name")
        txt_Printer3_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_3_Path")
        cmb_Printer3_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_3_Type"))

        ' Packout 1
        txt_Packout1_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout1_IP")
        txt_Packout1_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout1_Name")
        txt_Packout1_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout1_Path")
        cmb_Packout1_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_packout1_Type"))

        ' Packout 2
        txt_Packout2_IP.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout2_IP")
        txt_Packout2_Name.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout2_Name")
        txt_Packout2_Path.Text = GetSetting("PRINTER_packout2_Path")
        cmb_Packout2_Type.SelectedIndex = GetTypeIndex(GetSetting("PRINTER_packout2_Type"))
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Gets a setting value from the dictionary
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function GetSetting(key As String) As String
        If printerSettings.ContainsKey(key) Then
            Return printerSettings(key)
        End If
        Return ""
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Converts type string to combo box index
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function GetTypeIndex(typeValue As String) As Integer
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(typeValue) Then Return 0
        Dim typeNum As Integer
        If Integer.TryParse(typeValue, typeNum) Then
            Return typeNum
        End If
        Return 0
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Saves the printer configuration to file
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_Save_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Save.Click
        Try
            Dim lines As New List(Of String)()

            ' Printer 1
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_1_IP^" & txt_Printer1_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_1_Name^" & txt_Printer1_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_1_Path^" & txt_Printer1_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_1_Type^" & cmb_Printer1_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Printer 2
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_2_IP^" & txt_Printer2_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_2_Name^" & txt_Printer2_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_2_Path^" & txt_Printer2_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_2_Type^" & cmb_Printer2_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Printer 3
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_3_IP^" & txt_Printer3_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_3_Name^" & txt_Printer3_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_3_Path^" & txt_Printer3_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_3_Type^" & cmb_Printer3_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Packout 1
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout1_IP^" & txt_Packout1_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout1_Name^" & txt_Packout1_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout1_Path^" & txt_Packout1_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout1_Type^" & cmb_Packout1_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Packout 2
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout2_IP^" & txt_Packout2_IP.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout2_Name^" & txt_Packout2_Name.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout2_Path^" & txt_Packout2_Path.Text.Trim())
            lines.Add("@PRINTER_packout2_Type^" & cmb_Packout2_Type.SelectedIndex.ToString())

            ' Add comment line
            lines.Add("#Types: 1Name 2 3Other")
            lines.Add("")

            ' Create directory if it doesn't exist
            Dim directory As String = Path.GetDirectoryName(ConfigFilePath)
            If Not Directory.Exists(directory) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(directory)
            End If

            ' Write to file
            File.WriteAllLines(ConfigFilePath, lines)

            MessageBox.Show("Printer configuration saved successfully!", "Success", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
            Me.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
            Me.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error saving configuration: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub btn_Cancel_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_Cancel.Click
        Me.DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

End Class
